name: How many FAQ questions should I add for AEO?
description: Usually 5 to 7 focused questions are enough. Quality matters more than volume.

mainEntity.name: How many FAQ questions should I add for AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: You do not need a huge FAQ block. In many cases, 5 to 7 strong questions are better than a long list of weak ones. The goal is to cover the most important objections and decision points without making the page feel bloated.
acceptedAnswer.description: Usually 5 to 7 focused questions are enough. Quality matters more than volume.
